labels.label:
Loop 01 for clinical data
* Main goal: convert to homogeneus tabular CSV files
* JSON and XLS not currently maintained
* Multiline headers are not valid, so optionally a N header can be removed N-1 lines
* Filename is expected to contain the datasetId as prefix (datasetID_thisismydataset.csv) so this value is extracted already to check
Steps:
1. Read file and header
2. Write normalized csv file to staging
